paths.pg: Direct DB driver imports forbidden outside infra/postgres-*-repository.ts (see ADR-0005). Import via the repository port instead.
paths.postgres: Direct DB driver imports forbidden outside infra/postgres-*-repository.ts (see ADR-0005).
paths.@supabase/supabase-js: Vendor SDK imports forbidden outside infra/<vendor>-*-adapter.ts (see ADR-0002). Use the corresponding port.
paths.stripe: Vendor SDK imports forbidden outside infra/<vendor>-*-adapter.ts (see ADR-0002).
paths.@aws-sdk/client-s3: Vendor SDK imports forbidden outside adapters/s3-*.ts (see ADR-0002). Use the StoragePort.
paths.@anthropic-ai/sdk: Vendor SDK imports forbidden outside infra/anthropic-*-adapter.ts (see ADR-0002). Use the AgentProvider port.
paths.resend: Vendor SDK imports forbidden outside adapters/resend-*-adapter.ts (see ADR-0002). Use the EmailSender port.
paths.better-auth: Better Auth imports forbidden outside modules/auth/ (see ADR-0002).
